类 JAXRSDocBuildTemplate

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.template.JAXRSDocBuildTemplate
所有已实现的接口:
IBaseDocBuildTemplate, IDocBuildBaseTemplate, IDocBuildTemplate<ApiDoc>, IRestDocTemplate, IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<WebSocketDoc>, IWebSocketTemplate
public class JAXRSDocBuildTemplate extends Object implements IDocBuildTemplate<ApiDoc>, IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<WebSocketDoc>, IRestDocTemplate, IWebSocketTemplate
Build documents for JAX RS.
从以下版本开始:
2021/7/15

    • supportsFramework

    • renderApi

      render api

      参数:
      projectBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      candidateClasses - candidate classes
      返回:

    • buildEntryPointMethod

      public List<ApiMethodDoc> buildEntryPointMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, List<ApiReqParam> configApiReqParams, IRequestMappingHandler baseMappingHandler, IHeaderHandler headerHandler)
      从接口复制的说明: IRestDocTemplate
      Builds entry point method documentation. Generates API method documentation for the specified class, including all its methods and inherited methods that meet the documentation generation criteria.
      指定者:
      buildEntryPointMethod 在接口中 IRestDocTemplate
      参数:
      cls - The class to generate documentation for.
      apiConfig - The API configuration information.
      projectBuilder - Configuration builder for the project, used to obtain project-related configuration.
      frameworkAnnotations - Framework annotation information, used to handle mapping annotations.
      configApiReqParams - Configured request parameters, used to generate API request parameter documentation.
      baseMappingHandler - Handles request mapping annotations, used to process URL and HTTP method information.
      headerHandler - Handles request headers, used to generate request header documentation.
      返回:
      A list of API method documentation.

    • renderWebSocketApi

      public List<WebSocketDoc> renderWebSocketApi(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> candidateClasses)
      从接口复制的说明: IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate
      render websocket api
      指定者:
      renderWebSocketApi 在接口中 IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<WebSocketDoc>
      参数:
      projectBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      candidateClasses - candidate classes
      返回:
      websocket data

    • requestMappingPostProcess

      public void requestMappingPostProcess(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, RequestMapping requestMapping)
      从接口复制的说明: IRestDocTemplate
      Post-process the Java method associated with a RESTful API endpoint.
      指定者:
      requestMappingPostProcess 在接口中 IRestDocTemplate
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class associated with the API endpoint.
      method - The Java method associated with the API endpoint.
      requestMapping - The RequestMapping annotation associated with the API endpoint.

    • ignoreMvcParamWithAnnotation

      public boolean ignoreMvcParamWithAnnotation(String annotation)
      从接口复制的说明: IRestDocTemplate
      Determine whether a parameter should be ignored in a RESTful API endpoint.
      指定者:
      ignoreMvcParamWithAnnotation 在接口中 IRestDocTemplate
      参数:
      annotation - The annotation associated with the parameter.
      返回:
      True if the parameter should be ignored, false otherwise.

    • ignoreReturnObject

      public boolean ignoreReturnObject(String typeName, List<String> ignoreParams)
      从接口复制的说明: IBaseDocBuildTemplate
      Determines whether the return object should be ignored based on its type name and a list of ignored parameters.
      指定者:
      ignoreReturnObject 在接口中 IBaseDocBuildTemplate
      参数:
      typeName - The name of the type to check.
      ignoreParams - A list of parameter names that should be ignored.
      返回:
      true if the return object should be ignored; false otherwise.

    • isExceptionAdviceEntryPoint

      public boolean isExceptionAdviceEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      从接口复制的说明: IRestDocTemplate
      Unified exception handling entry for RESTful APIs.
      指定者:
      isExceptionAdviceEntryPoint 在接口中 IRestDocTemplate
      参数:
      javaClass - The Java class associated with the API endpoint.
      frameworkAnnotations - Annotations provided by the framework, which may include information about exception handling or other metadata.
      返回:
      The processed result, typically a response tailored for the RESTful API context.

    • processExceptionAdviceMethod

      public ExceptionAdviceMethod processExceptionAdviceMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method)
      从接口复制的说明: IRestDocTemplate
      Process the Java method associated with an exception handler in a RESTful API.
      指定者:
      processExceptionAdviceMethod 在接口中 IRestDocTemplate
      参数:
      method - The Java method associated with the exception handler.
      返回:
      The processed result, typically a response tailored for the exception handler.
